name: /doctor --explain prints the per-source resolution chain when multiple profiles merge and the last source wins
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:
  no-eval: warn
' > profiles/base.yaml && printf 'extends: [profiles/base.yaml]
rules:
  no-eval: error
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'profiles/base.yaml: warn' out.txt && grep -q 'profiles/p.yaml: error' out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=error' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
